productDisplayName: New Hide Men Leather Brown Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from Newhide is all set to pump up your style. Pair it with classy formals or jeans and semi-formal shirts. Length: 118 cm Width: 3.5 cm Made of leather for durability and style Buckle and holes to customise Fit Brand name embossed on the tail Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
